name: White Padded Floral Bride Groom Wedding Card
description: An elegant white padded wedding invitation featuring delicate floral artwork and embossed bride-groom motifs. Crafted on premium textured paper with a soft padded finish.

name: Blue Padded Floral Palace Wedding Card
description: A royal blue padded invitation with intricate palace architecture and golden floral borders. Perfect for grand traditional weddings.

name: Lavender Padded Peacock Palace Wedding Card
description: A serene lavender card with peacock and palace detailing in gold foil. A graceful choice for elegant celebrations.

name: Blue Floral Luxury Wedding Invitation Card
description: A luxury blue invitation with layered floral cut-work and a refined matte finish. Includes matching inserts and envelope.

name: Royal Baraat Padded Wedding Card with Gold Foil
description: A premium padded card depicting a royal baraat procession, finished with rich gold foil stamping on heavyweight board.

name: Maroon Floral Handle Padded Wedding Invitation
description: A deep maroon padded invitation with a decorative carry handle and floral gold accents. A statement piece for premium weddings.

name: Grey Gold Floral Padded Wedding Card
description: A contemporary grey padded card with subtle gold floral patterns. Modern, understated and elegant.

name: Cream Peacock Padded Wedding Card
description: A cream padded invitation showcasing ornate peacock motifs with gold detailing. Comes with premium matching envelopes.

name: Pastel Blue Floral Luxury Invitation Box
description: An exclusive pastel blue invitation box with floral embellishments, velvet lining and space for cards, sweets and gifts.

name: Gold Premium Luxury Invitation Box
description: A regal gold luxury invitation box with hand-finished detailing — the ultimate way to announce a grand celebration.

name: Green Padded Floral God Wedding Card
description: A traditional green padded card with auspicious god motifs and floral borders, ideal for devout family ceremonies.

name: Blue Floral Housewarming Invitation Card
description: A bright, welcoming card for housewarming ceremonies with floral artwork and space for ceremony details.
